framework.name: Verifiable Digital Credentials (VDCs)
framework.description: AP2's core trust mechanism — standardized, cryptographically signed data objects that convey authority between agents. These are tamper-evident, non-repudiable, portable digital credentials. This is the technical answer to 'how does the mandate chain work' — it's signed payloads, not on-chain attestation.
framework.raw_quote: Verifiable digital credentials are the standardized data structures used to convey trusted information between agents. They are tamper-evident, non-disputable, portable, and cryptographically signed digital objects that serve as the building blocks of a transaction.

source.title: AP2 specification - AP2 - Agent Payments Protocol Documentation
